hooks.command: bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); if [ -f "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/pre-bash.sh" ]; then cd "$ROOT" && bash .claude/hooks/pre-bash.sh; fi'
bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); if [ -f "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/pre-write.sh" ]; then cd "$ROOT" && bash .claude/hooks/pre-write.sh; fi'
bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); if [ -f "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/pre-write.sh" ]; then cd "$ROOT" && bash .claude/hooks/pre-write.sh; fi'
bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); if [ -f "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/post-write.sh" ]; then cd "$ROOT" && bash .claude/hooks/post-write.sh; fi'
bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); if [ -f "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/post-write.sh" ]; then cd "$ROOT" && bash .claude/hooks/post-write.sh; fi'
bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); if [ -f "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/post-bash.sh" ]; then cd "$ROOT" && bash .claude/hooks/post-bash.sh; fi'
